prose:
Method provenance block
Property: HOMO orbital energy (eV) for ethanol
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical self-consistent tight-binding, no Gaussian basis)
Geometry provenance: fixed user-supplied coordinates (ethanol.xyz at /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/visualize-orbitals-validation/ethanol/ethanol.xyz); no re-optimization – single-point SCF for orbitals (notation: GFN2-xTB//user xyz)
Solvent/environment: gas phase (implicit solvation off)
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet)
Software/backend: xTB 6.6 (invoked via chemkit visualize-orbitals skill)
Convergence & caveats: SCF finished; n_orbitals = 18; HOMO index 10; no warnings reported by the engine. Density-fitting not applicable to xTB. Implicit continuum only (none here).  

Headline result
HOMO energy = –11.203363 eV (LUMO = +1.3203392 eV ⇒ gap ≈ 12.52 eV).

Reproducibility
CLI invocation: 
/Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py orbitals --method xtb /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/visualize-orbitals-validation/ethanol/ethanol.xyz
Orbital file: /Users/evane/Desktop/Research/Argonne/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/visualize-orbitals-validation/ethanol/20260624-114413_ethanol_visualize_orbitals/agent_call_01_molden.molden
xtb workdir: /tmp/chemkit_orb_xtb_xtvruqjc
The live engine log was streamed to the caller’s cwd during the run (path surfaced at launch).
